name: Crypto Token Launch
description: Simulate the social media frenzy around a new cryptocurrency token launch. Observe how traders, influencers, skeptics, and retail investors create hype cycles, spread FUD, and move market sentiment.
simulation_requirement: Simulate the social media reaction to a new AI-focused cryptocurrency token launch over 36 hours. Track how crypto influencers, day traders, long-term investors, skeptics, and retail newcomers interact. Focus on hype cycles, fear/greed dynamics, how misinformation spreads vs corrections, and the role of influencer endorsements in shaping market sentiment. Include prediction market dynamics where participants bet on the token's price trajectory.
seed_document:
# NeuralCoin ($NRAL) Token Launch

## Project Overview
NeuralCoin is a new cryptocurrency project that claims to combine AI and blockchain technology. The token launched today on a major decentralized exchange with an initial market cap of $5 million.

## Key Claims
- "Revolutionary AI-powered smart contracts that optimize themselves"
- Partnership announcement with a mid-tier AI research lab
- Team includes 3 former engineers from major tech companies
- Whitepaper released 2 weeks ago, 47 pages
- Tokenomics: 1 billion total supply, 20% public sale, 15% team (2-year vest), 30% ecosystem fund, 35% community rewards

## Launch Day Events
- Token listed at $0.005, quickly rose to $0.012 in first hour (+140%)
- A prominent crypto influencer (800K followers) tweeted "Just loaded a bag of $NRAL. The AI narrative is going to be massive this cycle."
- Another influencer with 1.2M followers posted a skeptical thread: "Looked into NeuralCoin. The whitepaper has some red flags..."
- Initial liquidity: $2M locked for 1 year
- First 4 hours: 12,000 unique wallet holders
- A whale bought $150K worth in a single transaction, visible on-chain
- The project's Telegram has grown from 3K to 18K members in 24 hours

## Market Context
- Broader crypto market is in a mild uptrend (+3% over past week)
- AI-themed tokens have been the strongest sector for 2 months
- Recent high-profile rug pull in the AI token space (different project) has made some investors cautious
- Bitcoin is trading near an all-time high, creating general market optimism
- Regulatory concerns about AI tokens mentioned in a recent SEC statement

## Community Sentiment Triggers
- The team held an AMA (Ask Me Anything) session, answering technical questions
- A security auditor gave the smart contract a "medium confidence" rating
- Rumors circulating about a major exchange listing (unconfirmed)
- A competing project released a negative comparison analysis
